rulings.Case Title: CATHERINE AVERILL VS. BARBARA FEDUN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Determination Of Prevailing Party Status And For An Award Of Reasonable Attorney'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, APRIL 27, 2007, LINE 5. DEFENDANT BARBARA FEDUN'S Motion For Determination Of Prevailing Party Status And For An Award Of Reasonable Attorney'S Fees: THE MOTION IS TIMELY UNDER RULE 3.1702. THE DEFENDANT IS THE PREVAILING PARTY. PLAINTIFF'S CENTRAL CLAIM WAS FOR INJUNCTIVE RELIEF BASED ON STATUTORY VIOLATIONS NOT A CLAIM FOR BREACH OF THE LEASE. FURTHER, THERE IS NO EVIDENCE THAT THE LEASE HAS AN ATTORNEYS' FEE CLAUSE. REASONABLE ATTORNEYS' FEES TOTAL $2,616.00. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: NEXENT VENTURES LLC VS. DEUTSCHE BANK SECURITIES, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, APRIL 27, 2007, LINE 7. DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK SECURITIES, INC.'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. OVERRULED AS TO SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT AND THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CONVERSION. THE CLAIMS ARE NOT BARRED BY THE ENGAGEMENT LETTER, SECTION SEVEN, AND PLAINTIFF HAS ALLEGED A BREACH OF BOTH THE CONFIDENTIALITY AGREEMENT AND ENGAGEMENT LETTER. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND THE FIRST (FRAUD), THIRD (GROSS NEGLIGENCE) AND FIFTH (17200) CAUSES OF ACTION TO PLEAD FACTS ESTABLISHING A DUTY OR BASIS FOR THE CAUSE OF ACTION APART FROM PARTIES CONTRACTUAL AGREEMENTS. SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION (INTERFERENCE WITH ECONOMIC ADVANTAGE) TO CLARIFY AND ELABORATE AND EXPAND UPON WHAT THE RELATIONSHIP IS THAT ALLEGEDLY HAS BEEN INTERFERRED WITH. =(302/PJM/KD)
